title: Conis Explains the Sky World
description: Conis and Pagaya introduce the crew to dials and wavers while Skypiea’s peaceful surface hides danger ahead.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Nami, Luffy, Conis, Usopp, Sanji. Conis and Pagaya introduce the crew to dials and wavers while Skypiea’s peaceful surface hides danger ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But pressing it won't do anything...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WOW!! Even the shell called you stupid!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's mainly used to record music.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This sofa is kind of stiff--

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: USOP is stupid!!! Ah, why me?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: If this is what a dial is...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even though it's smaller, this is called...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But you still can't ride it.

summary: Conis and Pagaya introduce the crew to dials and wavers while Skypiea’s peaceful surface hides danger ahead.
